name: ZBOT-MOBILE
description: Mobile-friendly port for Geometry Dash. Recording / playback core derived from FigmentBoy's zBot; speedhack and additional behaviour referenced from zilko's xdBot. See CREDITS.md for full attribution.

disable-update-check.name: Disable update check
disable-update-check.description: Skip the once-per-launch GitHub Releases check that notifies you when a newer build of ZBOT-MOBILE is available.
